title: stipa zuvantica
intro: Stipa zuvantica, also known as the tufted hair grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This perennial grass is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stipa zuvantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
